Section 1
def count_word_occurrences(text, word):
    import re
    text_lower = text.lower()
    word_lower = word.lower()
    pattern = r'\b' + re.escape(word_lower) + r'\b'
    matches = re.findall(pattern, text_lower)
    return len(matches)

Section 2
This function converts both text and target word to lowercase to ensure case insensitivity. It uses regular expressions with word boundaries to match whole words only. The pattern escapes special characters in the target word to prevent regex errors. Finally, it returns the count of all matches found in the text.
